details: Dependency-confusion package that exfiltrates cloud provider credentials, SSH keys, npm/GitHub tokens, and environment secrets on install. The postinstall hook (package/postinstall.js) queries GCP and AWS instance metadata endpoints, runs gcloud CLI to obtain access tokens, reads ~/.aws/credentials, ~/.config/gcloud/*, ~/.npmrc, ~/.gitconfig, ~/.ssh/id_rsa, ~/.ssh/id_ed25519, /etc/environment, /proc/1/environ, and.env files. All harvested data is base64-encoded and POSTed as JSON to webhook[.]site/a585f4ec-20f7-4bd1-bac7-f3e53799dc5f. A second postinstall script (package/eslint-config/postinstall.js) performs the same exfiltration to webhook[.]site/12b523e2-ee58-4598-8fe1-bbf1f3999550.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
